entry.why: crypto fired: price dropped enough to trigger a mean-reversion entry; target +None%, stop -None%

exit.why: exited +2.89% on time/conditions before full target

what: Per-trade decision chain: why entered, why exited, outcome.
why: Makes every trade auditable end-to-end instead of a bare P&L line.
action: If TIMEOUT_GAIN dominates, exits fire before target = leaving edge on the table (matches the EARLY_EXIT forensics finding).
note: Exit reason inferred from realized vs target/stop (no stored per-trade exit tag yet).
